skills.name: PDF
skills.description: Work with PDF files: read, extract text, forms, and tables

skills.name: Word Documents
skills.description: Create, read, and edit Microsoft Word .docx files

skills.name: Excel Spreadsheets
skills.description: Create, read, and edit Excel .xlsx spreadsheets

skills.name: PowerPoint Presentations
skills.description: Create and edit PowerPoint .pptx presentations

skills.name: Canvas Design
skills.description: Create visual designs, posters, and graphics

skills.name: Web App Testing
skills.description: Test web applications using browser automation

skills.name: MCP Builder
skills.description: Build and scaffold MCP servers

skills.name: Frontend Design
skills.description: Design and build frontend interfaces and components

skills.name: Algorithmic Art
skills.description: Create generative and algorithmic visual art

skills.name: Slack GIF Creator
skills.description: Create animated GIFs suitable for Slack and chat

skills.name: Context7
skills.description: Fetch up-to-date library documentation via Context7. Use when the user asks about libraries, frameworks, APIs, or SDKs (React, Next.js, Prisma, Supabase, Tailwind, Django, Vue, etc). Bypasses MCP via HTTP API with CONTEXT7_API_KEY env var.

skills.name: GitHub
skills.description: Operate on GitHub via REST API — repos, PRs, issues, code search, releases. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with GITHUB_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: Slack
skills.description: Send messages, read channels, search Slack via REST API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with SLACK_BOT_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: Notion
skills.description: Create/edit pages, databases, tasks in Notion via REST API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with NOTION_API_KEY env var.

skills.name: Linear
skills.description: Create/update issues, projects, cycles in Linear via GraphQL API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with LINEAR_API_KEY env var.

skills.name: Figma
skills.description: Read Figma files, components, export assets via REST API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: Jira
skills.description: Create/query issues, boards, sprints in Jira Cloud via REST API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with JIRA_EMAIL + JIRA_API_TOKEN + JIRA_BASE_URL env vars.

skills.name: Exa Search
skills.description: AI-first web search via Exa API — semantic search, answer synthesis. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with EXA_API_KEY env var.

skills.name: Stripe
skills.description: Query/manage payments, customers, subscriptions, invoices via Stripe API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with STRIPE_API_KEY env var.

skills.name: Supabase
skills.description: Manage Supabase projects, query databases, auth, storage via Management API or Project REST. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN (management) or SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_ANON_KEY/SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (per-project) env vars.

skills.name: Vercel
skills.description: Manage Vercel deployments, projects, env vars, domains, and DNS via REST API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with VERCEL_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: Netlify
skills.description: Manage Netlify sites, deploys, functions, env vars, forms, and domains via REST API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: Cloudflare
skills.description: Manage Cloudflare DNS, Workers, Pages, R2, KV, D1, and analytics via REST API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: Railway
skills.description: Manage Railway projects, services, deployments, environments, and logs via GraphQL API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with RAILWAY_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: Resend
skills.description: Send transactional emails, manage domains, contacts, audiences, and broadcasts via REST API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with RESEND_API_KEY env var.

skills.name: Sentry
skills.description: Manage Sentry projects, query issues and events, list releases, retrieve session replays via REST API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: PostHog
skills.description: Query PostHog analytics events, insights, feature flags, experiments, session replays, and HogQL via REST API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with POSTHOG_PERSONAL_API_KEY env var.

skills.name: Lemon Squeezy
skills.description: Manage Lemon Squeezy stores, products, orders, customers, subscriptions, and license keys via REST API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with LEMONSQUEEZY_API_KEY env var.

skills.name: Discord
skills.description: Send messages, manage channels, guilds, roles, and webhooks on Discord via REST API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: Wellread
skills.description: Collective research memory for AI coding agents — search prior research before web-searching, save findings, view karma stats. Bypasses the MCP via direct JSON-RPC to the hosted endpoint with auto-registered API key (WELLREAD_API_KEY).

skills.name: Brainstorming
skills.description: Structured brainstorming workflow for exploring problem space before committing to a solution.

skills.name: Dispatching Parallel Agents
skills.description: Coordinate multiple agents in parallel for tasks that decompose cleanly into independent subtasks.

skills.name: Executing Plans
skills.description: Execute a previously written plan step-by-step with checkpoints and verification.

skills.name: Finishing a Development Branch
skills.description: Wrap up a feature branch cleanly: final review, commit hygiene, merge prep.

skills.name: Receiving Code Review
skills.description: Respond to code review feedback constructively — address comments, update PR, track unresolved items.

skills.name: Requesting Code Review
skills.description: Prepare a PR for review — title, description, test plan, reviewers, and self-review checklist.

skills.name: Subagent-Driven Development
skills.description: Delegate focused subtasks to specialized subagents while maintaining overall direction.

skills.name: Systematic Debugging
skills.description: Structured debugging workflow: reproduce, isolate, hypothesize, verify. Avoid shotgun fixes.

skills.name: Test-Driven Development
skills.description: Strict red-green-refactor TDD workflow. Write the test first, watch it fail, then implement minimally.

skills.name: Using Git Worktrees
skills.description: Work on multiple branches simultaneously with git worktree — when it's worth the complexity.

skills.name: Using Superpowers
skills.description: Meta-skill: how to use the Superpowers workflow suite as a coherent whole.

skills.name: Verification Before Completion
skills.description: Verify the work actually works before marking a task done — avoid premature 'done' signals.

skills.name: Writing Plans
skills.description: Write a concrete implementation plan before writing code — structure, steps, unknowns, verification.

skills.name: Writing Skills
skills.description: How to author new skills in the Superpowers / Claude Code skill format.
